title: Finansal Oran Analizi
description: Likidite, tahsilat, borç ödeme ve nakit akış oranları

aggregate.select: CAST((ISNULL(SUM(BAKIYE), 0) + ISNULL((SELECT SUM(BAKIYE) FROM [workcube_mikrolink_2026_1].[CASH_REMAINDER_LAST] WITH (NOLOCK)), 0)) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(ABS(BAKIYE)) FROM [workcube_mikrolink_2026_1].[COMPANY_REMAINDER] WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE BAKIYE < 0), 0)

CAST(ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN BAKIYE > 0 THEN BAKIYE END), 0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(NETTOTAL) FROM [workcube_mikrolink_2026_1].[INVOICE] WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE INVOICE_CAT = 59 AND INVOICE_DATE >= :_periodStart AND INVOICE_DATE <= :_periodEnd), 0) * DATEDIFF(DAY, :_periodStart, :_periodEnd)

CAST(ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN BAKIYE < 0 THEN ABS(BAKIYE) END), 0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(NETTOTAL) FROM [workcube_mikrolink_2026_1].[INVOICE] WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE INVOICE_CAT = 56 AND INVOICE_DATE >= :_periodStart AND INVOICE_DATE <= :_periodEnd), 0) * DATEDIFF(DAY, :_periodStart, :_periodEnd)
CAST(ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN INVOICE_CAT = 59 THEN NETTOTAL END), 0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(BAKIYE) FROM [workcube_mikrolink_2026_1].[COMPANY_REMAINDER] WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE BAKIYE > 0), 0)
ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN INVOICE_CAT = 59 THEN NETTOTAL END), 0)

trend.select: ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN INVOICE_CAT = 59 THEN NETTOTAL END), 0)

aggregate.select: CAST((ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TO_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0) - ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_FROM_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TO_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0)

trend.select: CAST((ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TO_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0) - ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_FROM_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TO_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0)

aggregate.select: CAST(ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN PROCESS_CAT IN (2, 3, 5) THEN ACTION_VALUE END), 0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN PROCESS_CAT = 1 THEN ACTION_VALUE END), 0)

FORMAT(ACTION_DATE, 'yyyy-MM') AS label, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PROCESS_CAT = 1 THEN FROM_CMP_ID END) AS FLOAT) * 30.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PROCESS_CAT IN (2, 3) THEN FROM_CMP_ID END), 0) AS value

FORMAT(ACTION_DATE, 'yyyy-MM') AS label, ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TO_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0) - ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_FROM_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS value
FORMAT(ACTION_DATE, 'yyyy-MM') AS label, ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN PROCESS_CAT = 1 THEN ACTION_VALUE END), 0) AS value, ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN PROCESS_CAT IN (2, 3, 5) THEN ACTION_VALUE END), 0) AS value2

CASE WHEN CHEQUE_DUEDATE < GETDATE() THEN 'Vadesi Geçmiş' WHEN CHEQUE_DUEDATE < DATEADD(DAY, 30, GETDATE()) THEN '0-30 Gün' WHEN CHEQUE_DUEDATE < DATEADD(DAY, 60, GETDATE()) THEN '30-60 Gün' WHEN CHEQUE_DUEDATE < DATEADD(DAY, 90, GETDATE()) THEN '60-90 Gün' ELSE '90+ Gün' END AS label, SUM(CHEQUE_VALUE) AS value
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN CHEQUE_DUEDATE < GETDATE() THEN 'Vadesi Geçmiş' WHEN CHEQUE_DUEDATE < DATEADD(DAY, 30, GETDATE()) THEN '0-30 Gün' WHEN CHEQUE_DUEDATE < DATEADD(DAY, 60, GETDATE()) THEN '30-60 Gün' WHEN CHEQUE_DUEDATE < DATEADD(DAY, 90, GETDATE()) THEN '60-90 Gün' ELSE '90+ Gün' END

aggregate.select: CASE INVOICE_CAT WHEN 56 THEN 'Alış Fatura' WHEN 59 THEN 'Satış Fatura' WHEN 57 THEN 'Alış İade' WHEN 60 THEN 'Satış İade' ELSE 'Diğer' END AS label, COUNT(*) AS value
aggregate.groupBy: CASE INVOICE_CAT WHEN 56 THEN 'Alış Fatura' WHEN 59 THEN 'Satış Fatura' WHEN 57 THEN 'Alış İade' WHEN 60 THEN 'Satış İade' ELSE 'Diğer' END

aggregate.select: FORMAT(ACTION_DATE, 'yyyy-MM') AS label, ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TO_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0) - ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_FROM_ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ACTION_VALUE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS value
